name: Fish Market Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, ground cinnamon, and salt.
2. Cut in butter with a pastry blender until the mixture has the consistency of coarse meal.
3. Sprinkle in just enough water to moisten the dough. Form into a ball.
4. Preheat oven to very hot 450°F (232°C).
5. Roll out dough on a lightly floured surface to a 12-inch round; fit into a 10-inch pie plate.
6. Turn under the overhanging pastry and flute to make a standing rim.
7. Refrigerate until ready to fill.
8. Beat egg slightly in a large bowl.
9. Stir in sour cream, sugar, flour, vanilla, and salt until smooth.
10. Add sliced apples, stirring gently just to coat (using a paring knife and slicing the apples into the cream mixture helps retard browning).
11. Spoon filling into the shell.
12. Bake in the preheated very hot oven at 450°F (232°C) for 10 minutes.
13. Lower heat to moderate 350°F (177°C) and bake an additional 35 minutes, or until lightly browned.
14. Prepare topping by sprinkling evenly over the filling.
15. Return pie to oven; bake at 350°F (177°C) for 15 minutes, or until lightly browned. This is a very large pie; you could almost make two 8-inch pies!
